SERVICES

Commercial Concrete Curbing in Utah

Large-scale decorative curbing for commercial properties, HOAs, apartment complexes, and municipal projects. Professional appearance with the durability to handle high-traffic areas.

Commercial properties need curbing that scales — hundreds or thousands of linear feet across parking lot islands, building perimeters, common areas, and entry features. Buzz Co handles commercial concrete curbing for HOAs, apartment complexes, retail centers, office parks, and municipal projects throughout Utah. Same quality as our residential work, but built for the scope and timelines that commercial projects demand.

The difference between residential and commercial curbing isn't the product — it's the logistics. Commercial jobs require coordination with property managers, tenants, landscaping crews, and sometimes city permitting. We handle the scheduling so installation happens in phases that minimize disruption to tenants and customers. A 2,000-foot apartment complex job doesn't shut down the whole property — we section it off and move through systematically.

For HOAs and property management companies, consistency matters. When you're curbing 40 townhome units or a multi-building complex, every border needs to match — same color, same profile, same quality from the first unit to the last. Our integral color system and machine extrusion process ensure uniformity across the entire project. No batch color variation, no handwork inconsistencies, no unit that looks different from its neighbor.

Volume pricing applies to commercial projects over 500 linear feet. The per-foot rate drops as footage increases because our setup and mobilization costs are spread across more production. We provide detailed written proposals with per-foot pricing, project phasing schedules, and completion timelines. For large projects, we can also provide references from other commercial properties we've completed in the area. Call for a commercial estimate — we'll walk the property and scope it with your maintenance team.

Common Questions

Our commercial pricing tier starts at 500 linear feet. Below that, residential per-foot rates apply. Most commercial projects we handle fall between 1,000 and 5,000 linear feet. For very large projects (10,000+ feet), we provide custom proposals with phased pricing and scheduling.

In most cases, yes. If the existing curbing was done in a standard integral color, we can match it closely from our 14-color lineup. We'll pull a sample or photo of the existing work and compare on-site. For older curbing that's faded significantly, we may recommend re-sealing the existing sections after the new work is installed so everything looks uniform.

It depends on total footage and phasing requirements. A 1,000-foot apartment complex with no phasing restrictions takes 2–3 days of pour time. A 5,000-foot HOA project phased across multiple weeks to minimize resident disruption might take 3–4 weeks total. We provide a detailed timeline in every commercial proposal so your management team can plan around it.

Related Services

Decorative Curbing

Decorative Concrete Curbing

Custom-poured concrete landscape curbing that adds clean, permanent borders to flower beds, walkways, and yard features. Choose from 14 colors, 10 stamp patterns, and 4 curb styles to match your home.

Learn more →

Landscape Edging

Landscape Edging

Permanent concrete edging that keeps mulch, rock, and soil contained while giving your landscaping a finished, professional look. No more plastic borders that shift and crack.

Learn more →

Flower Bed Borders

Flower Bed Borders

Beautiful, durable concrete borders for flower beds that eliminate the constant maintenance of traditional edging materials. Design curves and shapes that complement your garden layout.

Learn more →

Ready to get this done?

Justin comes out in the evening so both homeowners can be there. You walk the yard together, pick colors and patterns, and get a firm price on the spot. If it works, the crew is there the next morning.
